# LivePhotosKit.Errors

**Enumeration**

The errors that can occur when playing a LivePhoto.

## Declaration

```swift
interface LivePhotosKit.Errors {
	const number PHOTO_FAILED_TO_LOAD;
	const number VIDEO_FAILED_TO_LOAD;
};
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **VIDEO_FAILED_TO_LOAD**: Video asset failed to load.
- **PHOTO_FAILED_TO_LOAD**: Photo asset failed to load.

## Enumerations

- **LivePhotosKit.PlaybackStyle**: Possible playback styles.
title: LivePhotosKit.Errors
